description: Flusso completo save nuovo cliente ERP — certificazione da esecuzioni reali + archibald-bot.ts

saveBtnCertified.mechanism: Two-step: (1) click top-level 'SalvareSalvare' span to open dropdown; (2) click 'Salvare' from popup submenu
saveBtnCertified.note: NOT 'Salva e chiudi' — 'Salvare' keeps form open in edit mode

urlPatternAfterSave.profileIdFormat: numericId with dots as thousands separator: 57396 → '57.396'
urlPatternAfterSave.note: 'Salvare' (not 'Salva e chiudi') keeps form open — URL stays at ?NewObject=true until form saved with valid data. With Salva e chiudi, URL changes to /CUSTTABLE_DetailView/{numericId}/?mode=View

erpIdStrategies.strategy2_fromForm: read input[id*='xaf_dviID_Edit_I'].value — available in edit mode after save
erpIdStrategies.strategy3_fromList: search ListView by name as fallback

hard_errors_block_save: VATNUM (xaf_dviVATNUM_Edit_I) — must be unique across all customers
LOGISTICSADDRESSZIPCODE via popup (xaf_dviLOGISTICSADDRESSZIPCODE_Edit_find_Edit_I) — 'Indirizzo logistico CAP non deve essere vuoto'
FISCALCODE (xaf_dviFISCALCODE_Edit_I) — 'codice fiscale: non deve essere vuoto'
VATVALIDE = Yes — 'IVA validata: non deve essere uguale a 0' (VATNUM must be validated)
URL (xaf_dviURL_Edit_I) — must match ERP URL pattern; production bot uses 'nd.it' as fallback

from_archibald_bot_createCustomer: 11. VATNUM — MUST BE LAST, wait 5000ms + waitForDevExpressIdle after Tab
12. NAMEALIAS — after VATNUM (FISCALCODE XHR overwrites it)
certifiedWriteOrder.critical_note: VATNUM written LAST: Phase C/D XHR callbacks (from NAME/SDI/PEC Tab presses) silently clear VATNUM. Writing after all other fields ensures value persists.

capPopupFlow.type_delay: 100ms required — DevExpress SAC fires textChanged callbacks between chars
capPopupFlow.row_click: tr[class*='dxgvDataRow'] — find matching row then click td inside it
capPopupFlow.auto_fill: After OK: LOGISTICSADDRESSZIPCODE, CITY, COUNTY, STATE, COUNTRYREGIONID auto-populated

nameAliasAutoFill.behavior: NAME auto-fills NAMEALIAS with first 20 chars after Tab
nameAliasAutoFill.must_overwrite: NAMEALIAS must be explicitly re-typed after VATNUM because FISCALCODE XHR overwrites it

vatValidation.how_validated: Typing VATNUM triggers async XHR validation; if VAT is valid, VATVALIDE auto-sets to 'Sì'

remainingBlockers: FISCALCODE XHR callback clears PEC after FISCALCODE Tab
VATVALIDE stays 'No' because test VAT is not real
PEC field appears to reset after XHR (possibly email format validation)
rawDiagRun.validationErrorsObserved: ErrorLabel class — hard blockers: FISCALCODE, VATVALIDE, PEC, SDI
